case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1388 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5569/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16-10-2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Manzoor Khand, Inspector/ IO office of Deputy Director, ACE, Shaheed Benazirad and Muhammad Zaman Awan, Circle Officer, ACE, Naushahro Feroze >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that in the first instance for redressal of his grievances, the Petitioner will avail the alternate remedy before the Respondent No.1 / Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach the concerned authorities for the redressal of his grievances, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
